description: Ottimizzata per tutti gli iPhone compatibili con iOS 18 e successivi.
description_en: Optimized for all iPhones compatible with iOS 18 and later.

description: Supporto completo per iPad, inclusi Stage Manager e layout ottimizzato per schermi grandi.
description_en: Full iPad support, including Stage Manager and an optimized layout for large screens.

description: App nativa per Apple Watch con monitoraggio RAM, grafici CPU e pulizia direttamente dal polso.
description_en: Native Apple Watch app with RAM monitoring, CPU charts and cleanup right from your wrist.

description: Compatibile con tutti i Mac tramite Mac Catalyst e macOS Tahoe.
description_en: Compatible with all Macs via Mac Catalyst and macOS Tahoe.
